Class MongoJsonSchema.MongoJsonSchemaBuilder

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.mongodb.core.schema.MongoJsonSchema.MongoJsonSchemaBuilder
Enclosing interface:
MongoJsonSchema
public static class MongoJsonSchema.MongoJsonSchemaBuilder extends Object
MongoJsonSchema.MongoJsonSchemaBuilder provides a fluent API for defining a MongoJsonSchema.
Since:
2.1
Author:
Christoph Strobl
